business.name: Serene Balance Wellness
business.tagline: Coaching and therapeutic bodywork for calmer, clearer living.
business.intro: Private one-to-one sessions in a calm studio environment, tailored to your needs and pace.

services.name: Wellness Coaching
services.shortDescription: Goal-focused support for stress, confidence, and sustainable wellbeing routines.

services.name: Reflexology
services.shortDescription: Gentle pressure-point foot therapy to help your nervous system settle and recover.

services.name: Indian Head Massage
services.shortDescription: A focused upper-body treatment easing neck, scalp, and shoulder tightness.

policies.cancellation: Please provide at least 24 hours notice to cancel or reschedule. Late cancellations may be charged 50% of the session fee.
policies.arrival: Please arrive 5 minutes before your session start time to settle in.
policies.privacy: Your information is stored securely and only used to manage your care and appointments.

faq.question: How do I know which service is right for me?
faq.answer: If you are unsure, choose Coaching and include your goals in the notes. We will confirm the best fit before your appointment.

faq.question: Can I reschedule after booking?
faq.answer: Yes. Reply to your confirmation email or contact us directly and we will help you find a new time.

faq.question: Do you offer evening appointments?
faq.answer: Selected late slots are offered on Tuesdays and Thursdays depending on demand.

testimonials.name: Sophie M.
testimonials.quote: The sessions helped me reset my stress levels and build better daily routines. The booking process is effortless.

testimonials.name: Daniel R.
testimonials.quote: Reflexology sessions are now a key part of my recovery routine. Calm, professional and genuinely restorative.

testimonials.name: Aisha K.
testimonials.quote: The care and attention are excellent. I felt listened to and left every appointment feeling lighter and clearer.
